recommendations.title: Samson
recommendations.overview: After losing the love of his life to a cruel Philistine prince, a young Hebrew with Supernatural strength defends his people, sacrificing everything to avenge his love, his people, and his God.

recommendations.title: The Dark Valley
recommendations.overview: The Alps, late 19th century. Greider, a mysterious lone rider who claims to be a photographer, arrives at an isolated lumber village, despotically ruled by a family clan, asking for winter accommodation.

recommendations.title: Cloudy Mountain
recommendations.overview: The opening of the new tunnel, which took ten years to build, coincided with a series of serious cataclysms. The lives of 160,000 people depend on the actions of two people, a father and a son.

recommendations.title: The Seven Deadly Sins: Grudge of Edinburgh Part 1
recommendations.overview: Tristan, the son of Meliodas and Elizabeth, inherits the power of the Goddess Clan and can heal people’s wounds and injuries, but he often ends up hurting others due to his inability to control his Demon Clan power. To protect his family, Tristan hea

recommendations.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart at the River Styx
recommendations.overview: Ogami Itto battles a group of female ninja in the employ of the Yagyu clan and must eliminate a traitor who plans to sell his clan's secrets to the Shogunate.

recommendations.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart in Peril
recommendations.overview: Ogami Itto is hired to kill a tattooed female assassin and battles Retsudo, head of the Yagyu clan, and his son Gunbei.

recommendations.title: Kingdom of Heaven
recommendations.overview: After his wife dies, a blacksmith named Balian is thrust into royalty, political intrigue and bloody holy wars during the Crusades.

recommendations.title: The Clan of the Cave Bear
recommendations.overview: Natural changes have the clans moving. Iza, medicine woman of the "Clan of the Cave Bear" finds little Ayla from the "others"' clan - tradition would have the clan kill Ayla immediately, but Iza insists on keeping her. When the little one finds a mos

recommendations.title: Arn: The Knight Templar
recommendations.overview: Arn, the son of a high-ranking Swedish nobleman is educated in a monastery and sent to the Holy Land as a knight templar to do penance for a forbidden love.

recommendations.title: Hammamet
recommendations.overview: The last years of Bettino Craxi, one of the most important and controversial italian leader of the 1980's.
